device.name: iPad Air 11-inch (M3)
device.notes: UDID discovered at runtime via xcrun simctl list devices booted. If not booted, auto-boots iPad Air M3.

simulator_window.notes: macOS screen coordinates of the Simulator.app window. Run --calibrate to detect actual position.

click_method.notes: simctl has no tap command. CGEvent sends mouse click at macOS screen coordinates into Simulator window.

screenshots_sequence.title: Container App
screenshots_sequence.description: SwiftUI MainView showing NostrKey container app (Monokai theme, 340pt scroll view)
